message:
fix(pager): restore Mutex.lock() calls broken by sed in previous commit

The previous commit's sed command overly-aggressively changed ALL
.lock() calls to .write(), including those on Mutex<PagerInner>,
Mutex<HashMap>, and other Mutex types that should remain as .lock().

Only SharedWalBackend (Arc<RwLock<...>>) should use .write()/.read().
All other Mutexes (inner, consolidator, failed_epochs, sequence_gate,
GROUP_COMMIT_QUEUES) are restored to .lock().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
